errors.description: Required signed bundle LTV evidence is missing or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight until signed bundle LTV evidence is present and verifiable

errors.description: Required TSA certificate or trust-anchor fingerprint metadata is missing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight until certificate fingerprints are canonical hash-only values

errors.description: Required OCSP or CRL revocation source metadata is missing.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight until the hashed revocation source is present

errors.description: Revocation source type or source hash is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight until source metadata is OCSP or CRL and hash-only

errors.description: Freshness window or checked-at timestamp is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight until freshness bounds are deterministic and valid

errors.description: Revocation preflight hash binding does not match canonical evidence metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight until all LTV and source bindings match

errors.description: A previously observed revocation preflight record was reused.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight on replayed evidence planning records

errors.description: Revocation preflight diagnostics contain unsafe or sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation preflight until diagnostics are redacted and audit-safe
